settings.heading: Choose the right EZQuest setup before you shop
settings.copy: Start with the setup role, then move into the family and product that match the way you actually work.
settings.support_note: This guide connects your setup intent with the right EZQuest family, then moves into the product that fits best.

settings.heading: Pick the setup role that matches the way you work
settings.copy: Choose the role first, then move into the family and the exact product that fits.

settings.title: Everyday hybrid desk
settings.copy: Best for daily desks that need ports, power, and display without a full dock.

settings.title: Mobile and travel-first
settings.copy: Best for hotel desks, meetings, and lightweight carry kits.

settings.title: Permanent workstation
settings.copy: Best for desks that need displays, Ethernet, peripherals, and stable cable control.

settings.title: Charging and power layer
settings.copy: Best for setups that need reliable power before additional ports.

settings.title: Cables and accessories
settings.copy: Best for tightening cable paths or completing the last step.

settings.heading: Need to confirm fit before you decide?
settings.copy: Use compatibility or support when the setup still needs a closer check.
